description_long: This object is a rectangular book with a dark brown cover featuring an ornate, baroque-style frame illustration in the center. The frame is rendered in a gold and turquoise color palette, with intricate scrollwork and decorative flourishes. The background of the cover is patterned with a subtle, repeating motif that adds texture and richness to the design. Prominently displayed within the frame is bold magenta text, giving the book a luxurious and eye-catching appearance. The sides of the book repeat the ornate frame motif, but in a smaller size, maintaining visual consistency. The overall impression is one of opulence and vintage elegance, suggesting a high-end or collectible edition.
description: A richly decorated book with a dark brown patterned cover and an ornate gold-turquoise baroque frame illustration, accented by bold magenta text.
description_view_0: The front cover displays the ornate baroque frame in full, centered on a dark brown patterned background with magenta text inside the frame.
description_view_1: The left side shows a smaller version of the ornate frame and magenta text, with the same patterned brown background.
description_view_2: The back cover mirrors the front, featuring the same ornate frame and magenta text, maintaining symmetry.
description_view_3: The right side is similar to the left, with a smaller ornate frame and magenta text on the patterned brown background.
attribute_cover_illustration: The main illustration is an elaborate, baroque-style frame with swirling gold and turquoise scrollwork, set against a richly patterned brown background. The frame is highly detailed and ornate, evoking a sense of vintage luxury. No other imagery or figures are present within the frame.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is visible and features the same dark brown patterned background as the cover, with a smaller ornate frame and magenta text running horizontally. The design is consistent with the front and back covers, maintaining the book's opulent style.
